claim_boundary: This tranche validates Yang-Mills proof-apparatus discipline after BSD #320 closure.
It does not claim a continuum Yang-Mills construction.
It does not claim Clay Millennium resolution.
It does not move the v0.14.4 fixed-spacing strong-coupling wall.
It does not treat open PRs #22 or #23 as merged theorem-track inputs.
It treats YM-WP-v0.1 as planning, not theorem-track promotion.
repository_alignment_notes: Lawful Learning belongs to the HPhD mirror / hphd-zeta-mirror-lattice apparatus lane, not to the Yang-Mills repository.
This tranche is specifically for SocioProphet/yang-mills.
Open PRs #22 and #23 remain backlog inputs until separately validated and merged.

Move 1 second: v0.14.4 arXiv/CMP submission package after Move 4

what_to_avoid: Do not push N past 1000 as a substitute for bridge work.
Do not generalize SU(N>=4) before N=3 gates close.
Do not invest in continuum-construction infrastructure inside this tranche.
